{
  "claims": [
    "The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention reported in November 2018 that more than 3.6 million middle and high school students are using e-cigarettes.",
    "This number represents an increase of 1.5 million students compared to 2017.",
    "E-cigarette use among youth is almost 13 times higher than in 2011.",
    "From 2017 to 2018, there was approximately a 78 percent increase in e-cigarette use among high school students.",
    "There was a 48 percent increase in e-cigarette use among middle school students between 2017 and 2018.",

    "By 2018, 1 in 20 middle school students were using e-cigarettes."
